dashboard.label: Veritrace Reasoning Ledger
dashboard.description: Every investigation Veritrace runs is written back into Splunk. This is the glass box: search, audit and replay the agent's evidence, reasoning and actions.

search.query: index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:investigation | stats avg(confidence) as c | eval c=round(c*100,0)
index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:investigation | stats avg(mttr_seconds) as m | eval m=round(m,1)
index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:investigation | stats sum(total_tokens) as t
index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:investigation | table _time investigation_id alert_name verdict severity confidence mttr_seconds step_count | sort - _time

panel.title: Reasoning trace (glass box, each step sealed)

search.query: index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:reasoning | eval seal=substr(entry_hash,1,12) | table _time investigation_id seq kind title technique_id confidence spl result_count seal | sort investigation_id seq

panel.title: Chain of custody (each investigation sealed with a ledger root)

search.query: index=veritrace_ledger sourcetype=veritrace:investigation | eval ledger_root=substr(ledger_root,1,24) | table _time investigation_id verdict step_count ledger_root | sort - _time
index=veritrace_detections sourcetype=veritrace:detection | table _time name severity backtest_hits_incident backtest_false_positives mitre_techniques schedule_cron | sort - _time
